Description: Enable the use of the V2 model for Azure Functions projects and enable Application Insights.

Snippet: Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker, 1.21.0  Recommendation:  Remove Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker, and replace with new package Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker 2.51.0

Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Extensions.Http, 3.1.0  Recommendation:  Remove Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Extensions.Http, and replace with new package Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Extensions.Http 3.3.0
Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Sdk, 1.17.0  Recommendation:  Remove Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Sdk, and replace with new package Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Sdk 2.0.7

Description: Project's target framework(s) needs to be changed
Snippet: Current target framework: net8.0 Recommended target framework: net10.0
